description: Phase 24 scan_coverage_map: reports/n6_coverage_map.json must exist with status=GREEN. Reverse of P18 — checks that every canonical source directory (atlas/engine/scanners/tool/config/domains/papers/techniques/experiments/theory/bridge/calc) is referenced by at least one scan function in tool/_n6_lib. A dir with references=0 is 'unobserved' — content drift there goes unnoticed. Static name-proxy only (not semantic coverage); observe-only in P24. A future phase may gate on unobserved_count once each currently-unobserved dir is either scanned or explicitly allowlisted.
actual_cmd: bash -c '[ -f reports/n6_coverage_map.json ] && jq -r "if .status == \"GREEN\" then 1 else 0 end" reports/n6_coverage_map.json 2>/dev/null || echo 0'
